ul.li: Memory Ordering: NIC reads tx_tail to detect work. Ensure memory barrier before doorbell write.
RX Head: Incremented by HW after successful DMA and status writeback.
RX Tail: Incremented by SW after packet processing and buffer reclaim.
Ownership: 'OWN_NIC' bit prevents CPU from touching active DMA targets.
Cache Locality: Descriptor arrays should be 64-byte aligned for performance.

g.title: PCIe BAR0 Base Address - Map to Kernel/User Space
Updated by Hardware after successful DMA write
Updated by Software to provide empty buffers to NIC
Updated by Hardware after packet wire-time transmission
Software Doorbell: NIC polls this for new work
PCIe BAR0 Base Address - Map to Kernel/User Space
Updated by Hardware after successful DMA write
Updated by Software to provide empty buffers to NIC
Updated by Hardware after packet wire-time transmission
Software Doorbell: NIC polls this for new work
